title: glochidion muelleri
intro: Glochidion muelleri, also known as the Mueller's Glochidion or Glochidion muelleri, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Asia, particularly in countries such as India, Malaysia, and Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic activities. The health benefits of Glochidion muelleri include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction using the leaves or roots of the plant.
